title: Important Dates for SM Shetty College Admission 2026

detail.title: Important Dates for SM Shetty College Admission 2026
detail.short_info: SM Shetty College Merit List 2026 First List has been released on 26 May 2026. Check and download course-wise merit lists for B.Com, B.Sc IT, BAMMC, BBI, BAF and other courses at smshettycollege.edu.in.

content.text: SM Shetty College Merit List 2026 (First Merit List) has been released today on 26 May 2026 for various undergraduate courses. Candidates can now check the course-wise merit lists on the official website smshettycollege.edu.in.

Bunts Sangha's S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce and Management Studies (SM Shetty College) has released the First Merit List 2026-27 for First Year UG admissions. The college offers various self-financed and aided courses under the University of Mumbai.

sections.heading: SM Shetty College Merit List 2026 Overview

rows: S.M. Shetty College of Science, Commerce & Management Studies
B.Com, B.Sc IT, B.Sc Data Science, BAMMC, BBI, BAF, BMS etc.

sections.heading: Important Dates for SM Shetty College Admission 2026
Course-wise SM Shetty College Merit List 2026

content.text: Here are the direct links to download the First Merit List 2026 for all courses:

links.label: BAMMC (Bachelor of Arts in Multimedia & Mass Communication)

content.text: Note: More courses and subsequent merit lists (2nd, 3rd) will be updated on the official website.

sections.heading: How to Check SM Shetty College Merit List 2026

items: Go to the Admission or First Merit List 2026-27 section.
Click on the respective course merit list link.
Download the PDF and search for your name/application number.
Follow the instructions for document verification and fee payment.

structured_links.label: BAMMC (Bachelor of Arts in Multimedia & Mass Communication)
